reason: Browser-use feature successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and returned the correct response in the chat.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with agents listed in sidebar.
Clicked on "QA-20260615-014755-s2dt" agent in the main content area — Agent chat interface opened successfully.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the textbox — Message appeared in the input field.
Clicked "Send message" button — Message was sent and agent began processing (status changed to "working").
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed task in approximately 13 seconds.
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states: "The page title is \"Example Domain\"."
Took full-page screenshot — Screenshot captured showing complete conversation with agent response and live browser preview panel displaying the Example Domain page.
